scripts.test:e2e: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.e2e -- npm run test --prefix e2e
scripts.test:e2e:telephony: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.e2e -- npm run test:telephony --prefix e2e
scripts.test:e2e:html: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.e2e -- npm run test:html --prefix e2e
scripts.test:e2e:telephony:html: dotenvx run --env-file=.env.e2e -- npm run test:telephony:html --prefix e2e
scripts.test:e2e:telephony:sipp:build: docker compose -f docker-compose-e2e.yaml --env-file .env.e2e -p comcent-e2e build sipp sipp-uas
scripts.test:e2e:telephony:stack:up: E2E_SBC_ADMIN_SERVICE=sbc docker compose -f docker-compose-e2e.yaml --env-file .env.e2e -p comcent-e2e up -d --build
scripts.test:e2e:telephony:stack:up:kamailio: E2E_SBC_ADMIN_SERVICE=sbc-kamailio COMPOSE_PROFILES=kamailio docker compose -f docker-compose-e2e-telephony.yaml --env-file .env.e2e -p comcent-e2e-telephony up -d --build
scripts.docker:db:migrate: docker compose exec -w /app server mix ecto.migrate
scripts.docker:populate-country-state: docker compose exec -w /code/packages/tools/ comcent-all-in-one node populate_country_state.js
scripts.docker:web-app:build: docker run --workdir /code -v "$(pwd)":/code node:20.11.1 sh -c "npm i && npm run build"
scripts.check:elixir: cd server && mix format && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && cd ..
